Geist & Geist Mono
==================

Bundled font files:
- GeistVF.woff2
- GeistMonoVF.woff2

Geist and Geist Mono are designed by Vercel and licensed under the
SIL Open Font License, Version 1.1 (OFL-1.1).

Upstream: https://github.com/vercel/geist-font
License:  https://github.com/vercel/geist-font/blob/main/LICENSE.TXT

These files are redistributed here unmodified to make Agent Debate's built-in
theme self-contained. The OFL-1.1 permits bundling and redistribution; the
fonts may not be sold on their own.
